center.summary: 肯尼亚东非大裂谷的湖泊系统是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Green tinkerbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found along the East African coastal plain, inhabiting the foothills of the Eastern Arc Mountains and the Great Rift Valley
